title: ricinocarpus oxyodontus
intro: Ricinocarpus oxyodontus, also known as the bitter leaf tree, is a plant species that belongs to the family Celastraceae. Traditionally, the leaves of the Ricinocarpus oxyodontus plant have been used in herbal medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant properties. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as a digestive aid. In herbal preparations, the leaves of Ricinocarpus oxyodontus are often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions, and may also be dried or powdered for use in supplements or capsules.
